title: Manage fauna populations
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage fauna populations demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Assess fauna populations

pcs.text: Conduct surveys for distribution, ecology, viability, genetic diversity and threats
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct surveys for distribution, ecology, viability, genetic diversity and threats?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct surveys for distribution, ecology, viability, genetic diversity and threats.

pcs.text: Determine increase or decrease in species population size and range
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine increase or decrease in species population size and range?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine increase or decrease in species population size and range.

pcs.text: Assess desirability of the population change and impact on immediate environment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess desirability of the population change and impact on immediate environment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess desirability of the population change and impact on immediate environment.

pcs.text: Assess condition of the environment and habitats for ongoing support of species
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess condition of the environment and habitats for ongoing support of species?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess condition of the environment and habitats for ongoing support of species.

pcs.text: Research species numbers in other locations to determine significance of local population
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research species numbers in other locations to determine significance of local population?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research species numbers in other locations to determine significance of local population.

pcs.text: Assess attitudes of stakeholders to the species to determine acceptable range of population management options
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess attitudes of stakeholders to the species to determine acceptable range of population management options?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess attitudes of stakeholders to the species to determine acceptable range of population management options.

pcs.text: Complete a cost/benefit analysis of population management options
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete a cost/benefit analysis of population management options?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete a cost/benefit analysis of population management options.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Assess fauna populations

elements.title: Prepare management plan

pcs.text: Develop plan of management from assessment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop plan of management from assessment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop plan of management from assessment.

pcs.text: Prepare submissions for funding to implement management plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare submissions for funding to implement management plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare submissions for funding to implement management plan.

pcs.text: Reconcile costs of plan for management against available funds
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Reconcile costs of plan for management against available funds?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Reconcile costs of plan for management against available funds.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare management plan

elements.title: Control or maintain fauna population

pcs.text: Develop plan to manage species using a series of intervention measures according to resource constraints and legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop plan to manage species using a series of intervention measures according to resource constraints and legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop plan to manage species using a series of intervention measures according to resource constraints and legislative requirements.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement measures to manage population?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement measures to manage population.

pcs.text: Obtain permits for population management according to legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain permits for population management according to legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain permits for population management according to legislative requirements.

pcs.text: Inform stakeholders and staff about population management measures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inform stakeholders and staff about population management measures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inform stakeholders and staff about population management measures.

pcs.text: Ensure management measures comply with workplace health and safety, animal welfare, biosecurity and environmental sustainability policies and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure management measures comply with workplace health and safety, animal welfare, biosecurity and environmental sustainability policies and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure management measures comply with workplace health and safety, animal welfare, biosecurity and environmental sustainability policies and procedures.

pcs.text: Ensure staff are trained and comply with licensing requirements for managing population
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure staff are trained and comply with licensing requirements for managing population?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure staff are trained and comply with licensing requirements for managing population.

pcs.text: Manage incidents with species according to legislative, workplace health and safety and public safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Manage incidents with species according to legislative, workplace health and safety and public safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Manage incidents with species according to legislative, workplace health and safety and public safety requirements.

pcs.text: Monitor and adjust management plan and record results in accordance with legislative and workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and adjust management plan and record results in accordance with legislative and workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and adjust management plan and record results in accordance with legislative and workplace requirements.
